FIGHTER_KEYWORD_THROW.title: Throw
FIGHTER_KEYWORD_STARTER.title: Starter
FIGHTER_KEYWORD_COMBO.title: Combo
FIGHTER_KEYWORD_COMBO.description: Consume [gold]1[/gold] Combo for a bonus effect.
FIGHTER_KEYWORD_CANCEL.title: Cancel
FIGHTER_KEYWORD_CANCEL.description:
Cancel N = Gain N Cancel.
Special/Super cards consume Cancel for [blue]-1[/blue] Energy.
Cancel resets after your next card.
FIGHTER_KEYWORD_SPECIAL.title: Special
FIGHTER_KEYWORD_SPECIAL.description:
Costs [gold]2[/gold] Fighting Spirit.
During burnout, costs Energy + 2× Energy in frames instead.
FIGHTER_KEYWORD_SUPER.title: Super
FIGHTER_KEYWORD_SUPER.description:
Super N = Consume N Super Gauge.
Restores [blue]3[/blue] Fighting Spirit.
Consumes all frames to boost effect.
